Observation-level footnotes:
Current data are collected on only 5 big wild animals in
Akagera National Parks, namely: Elephants (120),
Lions (40), Buf-falos
(4,000), Rhinoceros
(27), and Leopards (100). For this category the reported proportion of poached or illicitly traf-ficked is 0%, (GPS Tracking devises help
in their monitoring) their total counts is 4,287. Also, Gorillas are monitored and approximatlely 604 as
of 2021.
SERIES: Proportion of traded wildlife that was poached or illicitly trafficked [15.7.1]
